observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 10 retained surfaces with standardized vision QA, a unified regression orchestrator, and autonomous cron Darwin loop support. After the multi-surface-proof addition, the remaining gap is keeping WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, mutation-candidates.json, and examples/*.html in sync across all surfaces — docs/surface parity drift is a recurring failure mode in autonomous runs.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass and keep docs, examples, and checks in sync without manual inspection

candidates.mutation: Add a machine check (bun creator:multi-surface-proof) that validates every retained surface HTML artifact against measure:check + print:render in one pass, using the existing fixed-canvas contracts. This is the artifact-measurement companion to the regression orchestrator.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-multi-surface-proof.ts that iterates over all 11 retained surface HTML files, runs measure:check and print:render for each, and reports overflow/render completeness with per-surface PASS/FAIL and timing
candidates.risk: Must stay in sync with WORKFLOW_INDEX surface entries; must not hardcode paths that change. Canvas sizes must match per-surface contracts (1684x1191 default, 1200x630 for social-card).

candidates.mutation: Add a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (bun creator:darwin-autonomy-check) that validates repo anchor, dirty-worktree safety, MCP connectivity, and baseline gates before an autonomous cron slice begins execution.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-darwin-autonomy-check.ts that runs repo-anchor validation, git status safety, MCP test, and baseline creator:mutation-check as a single gate before autonomous execution
candidates.risk: MCP test may fail transiently on some providers; must treat MCP unavailability as a warning, not a hard block.

candidates.mutation: Add a parity check (bun creator:docs-surface-parity) that validates WORKFLOW_INDEX.md surface entries, mutation-candidates.json retained_routes, and examples/*.html files are in sync — catching the recurring docs/surface drift failure mode.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-docs-surface-parity.ts that cross-references WORKFLOW_INDEX.md table entries, retained_routes in the candidate ledger, and actual examples/*.html files for creator surfaces, reporting any missing/mismatched entries
candidates.risk: Must parse WORKFLOW_INDEX.md markdown table reliably; must handle new surface additions gracefully.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (15-surface check + hackathon:score in one pass)

retention: Retain creator-multi-surface-proof-route as the unified artifact-measurement gateway: single-pass 11-surface measure:check + print:render with per-surface PASS/FAIL and timing. Removed creator-colorway-remix-route from candidates (blocked: deferred until two surfaces need the same palette proof). Added creator-docs-surface-parity-route as fresh candidate (catches WORKFLOW_INDEX ↔ retained_routes ↔ examples/*.html parity drift).
